title: GENERAL
doc_html:
SUBTITLE II.  ENVIRONMENTAL QUALITY

CHAPTER 1.  GENERAL

§2001.  Short title

This Subtitle shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Environmental Quality Act."

Acts 1983, No. 97, §1, eff. Feb. 1, 1984.

SUBTITLE II.  ENVIRONMENTAL QUALITY
CHAPTER 1.  GENERAL
§2001.  Short title
This Subtitle shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Environmental Quality Act."
Acts 1983, No. 97, §1, eff. Feb. 1, 1984.
